Faction/FactionActivity/BasicValues/SetI.label: Inactive Timeout (Hours)
Faction/FactionActivity/BasicValues/SetI.description: Time after which factions become inactive when offline.

validation.message: Inactive timeout must be a whole number.

Faction/FactionActivity/BasicValues/SetA.label: Reactivate After Minutes Online
Faction/FactionActivity/BasicValues/SetA.description: Minutes online needed to set a faction active again.

validation.message: Reactivate time must be a whole number.
